linting.notes: golangci-lint is configured with multiple linters enabled including copyloopvar, dupl, errcheck, ginkgolinter, govet, ineffassign, lll, misspell, nakedret, prealloc, revive, staticcheck, unconvert, unparam, and unused. Formatters gofmt and goimports are also enabled.

testing.run_command: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.34 --bin-dir ./bin -p path)" go test $(go list ./... | grep -v /e2e) -coverprofile cover.out
env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - path to envtest binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver, kubectl)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest to provide a real (not mocked) Kubernetes API server for controller testing
testing.coverage_command: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.34 --bin-dir ./bin -p path)" go test $(go list ./... | grep -v /e2e) -coverprofile cover.out
testing.notes: Unit tests use Kubernetes controller-runtime envtest which requires etcd and kube-apiserver binaries. E2E tests require a Kind cluster and are excluded from the standard test run. Tests achieved 62.0% coverage in validation. The project uses Ginkgo BDD-style tests with table-driven test patterns.

gating_checks.name: Verify Generated Code
gating_checks.command: make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code

gating_checks.name: E2E Tests
gating_checks.command: make docker-build && kind load docker-image && go mod tidy && make test-e2e

ci.notes: All workflows trigger on pull_request with path filters. E2E tests and sample validation require Kind cluster infrastructure. The project also has Tekton pipelines in .tekton/ directory for alternative CI systems.

build.notes: The project is a Kubernetes operator built with kubebuilder. Build requires running 'make manifests' and 'make generate' first to generate CRDs and deepcopy methods. Container build uses UBI9 base images with Go 1.24 toolset and supports FIPS-compliant builds.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style: Describe/Context/It blocks, table-driven tests with Entry(), regular Go test functions with Test* prefix
conventions.import_style: Standard Go import grouping (stdlib, external, internal)
conventions.package_structure: Kubernetes operator structure: api/ for CRD definitions, internal/controller for reconciliation logic, config/ for kustomize manifests, test/e2e for end-to-end tests
conventions.notes: Follows kubebuilder project structure conventions. Uses controller-runtime patterns for Kubernetes operators. Helm charts are embedded in the operator binary at charts/mlflow/.

test_commands.notes: Passed, 62.0% coverage. Note: absolute path required for KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS in container.

container_recipe.notes: The envtest binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver, kubectl) must be downloaded via setup-envtest. Use absolute paths for KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS in containers. E2E tests are excluded from standard test runs as they require a Kind cluster.

validation.summary: All validation steps passed: deps OK, build OK, codegen OK, lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (62.0% coverage)

gaps: E2E tests require Kind cluster and cannot be validated in basic container
Sample validation requires Kubernetes cluster access
Some CI checks require external infrastructure (Kind cluster) not available in isolated container validation
